definitions.text: To launch (forcefully project) a projectile. To fire (a weapon that releases a projectile).
examples: The man, in a desperate bid for freedom, grabbed his gun and started shooting anyone he could.

definitions.text: To fire (a weapon that releases a projectile).
The emerging stem and embryonic leaves of a new plant.
A mild expletive, expressing disbelief or dismay
examples: Didn't you have a concert tonight? —Shoot! I forgot! I have to go and get ready…
